description: Botivate is a Business Automation and AI company. We don't sell ERP software. We help businesses run on autopilot — by understanding their processes deeply, standardizing workflows, automating operations, and layering AI on top. Our flagship product AutoRocket is an AI-first business operating system built from 70+ reusable automation modules developed from real client implementations across manufacturing, trading, hospitals, jewellery, real estate, steel, coal trading, solar, and service companies.
mission: Make every business run itself. Automate the business, not just the software.
vision: Become the world's leading Business Automation and AI Company. Every business decision backed by AI. AI Managers, AI Sales Teams, AI Operations, AI Finance, AI HR — a complete AI operating system where the business runs itself.
founding_story: Botivate started with just 2 people and a vision to solve real business problems. Instead of building software from an office, the founders worked directly at client locations — sitting with supervisors, managers, directors, accountants, plant heads, maintenance teams, stores, dispatch teams, and operators to understand root problems from the ground up. Every solved client problem was converted into a reusable automation module. This is how the company grew from 2 to 40+ professionals and 70+ modules.

problem: Purchase and inventory tracking in Excel
No live MIS or management dashboard
Delayed management decisions due to lack of real-time data
Government auction tracking done on paper
Payment advice management scattered across teams
Multiple documents lost or mismanaged across teams
results: Fully digital workflow from bid to dispatch
Reduced document loss to near zero
Faster operations and shorter procurement cycles

problem: Separate manual tracking for government and market procurement
Purchase confusion due to two different procurement channels
results: Single unified procurement platform for both channels
Significantly reduced manual work and errors

sales_intelligence.typical_deal_size: ₹4,00,000+ per annual automation project (enterprise projects vary by scope)
top_3_objections: Budget constraints — prospect feels cost is high upfront
Fear of changing existing processes — resistance to change
We already use ERP — existing ERP investment creates inertia
why_deals_stall_or_lost: Decision delays and internal approval chains
Lack of urgency at decision-maker level
Existing ERP investment makes switching feel risky
Long procurement cycles in larger companies

differentiators.vs_zoho: Zoho provides business applications. Botivate delivers complete automation, consulting, implementation and AI tailored to the client's specific processes — not off-the-shelf modules.
differentiators.vs_tally: Tally manages accounting. Botivate automates the entire business — from enquiry to dispatch. Tally is a tool; Botivate is a transformation.
differentiators.vs_sap: SAP is a traditional ERP. Botivate positions AutoRocket as an AI automation layer above ERPs — integrating with existing systems rather than replacing them. Faster, cheaper, more flexible.
differentiators.vs_custom_dev: Custom developers build one-off software. Botivate converts industry experience into reusable, continuously improving modules with long-term consulting support.
differentiators.vs_odoo: Odoo is open-source ERP. Botivate focuses on business process consulting + automation + AI — not just software installation.
differentiators.vs_microsoft_dynamics: Dynamics is expensive enterprise ERP. Botivate is cost-effective, faster to implement, and AI-native from day one.

competitive_positioning.core_differentiator: We don't just build software. We understand businesses first, standardize their operations, then automate them with AI. Product + Consulting + Training in one package.

product_roadmap.biggest_technical_challenge: Building a scalable AI orchestration layer that integrates seamlessly with existing ERPs, cloud services and messaging platforms while maintaining security and performance.

details: Product capability significantly exceeds current market awareness
Enterprise sales cycles are long (30-90 days) and require multiple stakeholder buy-in
AI positioning needs stronger branding and public proof points
Scaling implementation capacity while maintaining delivery quality is a key operational challenge
Zero public case studies — no visible proof of value for inbound prospects

current_active_states: Other Indian states via remote implementation

government_initiatives: Preparing for enterprise and government procurement opportunities

strategic_priorities: Position AutoRocket as the AI Business Operating System that sits above traditional ERP platforms — not a replacement, an AI layer.
Scale enterprise sales and build a repeatable implementation model without compromising delivery quality.
Build a global AI-first automation platform capable of running business operations autonomously.

core_product.name: AutoRocket
core_product.description: AutoRocket is an AI-first Business Operating System — positioned above traditional ERPs as the AI automation layer. It is not just ERP, not just CRM, not just AI — it is an operating system where AI manages the business. Built from 70+ proven automation modules.
core_product.positioning: The AI automation layer above ERPs. Not a replacement — an upgrade.
core_product.public_presence: Zero — no app store listing, no G2/Capterra reviews, no public case studies as of June 2026
key_capabilities: AI Agents that manage business workflows autonomously
WhatsApp Automation for approvals, alerts and business communication
Director Dashboard with real-time business intelligence
70+ reusable automation modules across all business functions
AI Sales Agent for automated lead handling and follow-ups
Knowledge Base AI for business processes

evolution_phases.description: Company started with just 2 members and a vision to solve real business problems.
Worked directly at client locations — sat with supervisors, managers, directors, accountants, plant heads, maintenance teams, stores, dispatch and operators to understand root problems firsthand.
Started converting every solved client problem into reusable automation modules. Built 70+ modules across manufacturing, trading, HR, finance, CRM, production, and AI.
Expanded team from 2 people to 40+ professionals. Served clients across Chhattisgarh, Maharashtra, MP, Gujarat, Odisha.
Integrated AI Agents, WhatsApp Automation, and Business Intelligence. Clients include steel mills, coal traders, rice manufacturers.
Building AutoRocket as an AI-first business operating system — positioned above traditional ERPs as the AI automation layer.

Market awareness is the primary bottleneck. Product capability exceeds public awareness. Actively building enterprise sales, public case studies, and international expansion readiness (UAE, Singapore).

vision_evolution: Phase 3: Become India's leading Business Automation Company.
Phase 4: Build AI that works for businesses.
Current Vision: Every business should run itself.
technology_evolution: Current: AI Agents, Workflow Automation, Cloud-native Platform, AutoRocket
business_strategy: Understand the business first — visit client sites, map real processes
Identify root problems, not surface symptoms
Automate the workflow with reusable modules
Integrate AI on top of automation
Implement with the team — not just hand over software
Train users — consulting, not just software delivery
Continuously improve — every client feedback becomes a product module
Convert every learning into a reusable product module
Repeat and scale across industries and geographies
key_decisions: Instead of copying ERPs: Build from real business experience on client sites
Instead of selling software: Sell complete business automation + consulting
Instead of one industry: Serve every business vertical
Instead of one product: Build 70+ reusable modules
Instead of outsourcing understanding: Founders personally visit client sites
Instead of stopping after delivery: Provide continuous improvement
Instead of replacing employees: Make employees more productive with AI
Positioning AutoRocket above ERPs — not as ERP replacement but AI automation layer
GeM registration for government market entry
UAE and Singapore as first international expansion targets
lessons_learned: Software doesn't solve problems. Process does.
Every business is different — no one-size-fits-all solution.
Users need consulting, not just software.
Automation should save time, not add complexity.
Every complaint is an opportunity to improve the product.
Build reusable solutions — convert every project into a module.
AI should assist people, not replace them.
Long-term trust matters more than short-term revenue.
Market awareness is as important as product quality.
Enterprise sales requires patience — 30-90 day cycles are normal.
competitive_advantages: Built from real client site experience — not from copying competitors
70+ reusable modules developed from actual implementations
Deep domain expertise: steel, coal trading, rice manufacturing, hospitals, jewellery
Consulting + software + training — full business transformation package
Continuous improvement — every client feedback becomes a product improvement
AutoRocket positioned above ERPs — unique AI layer positioning
3 documented case studies: Steel Rolling Mill, Jai Bhole Group (Coal), Rice Manufacturing
known_gaps: Zero public brand presence — no G2, Capterra, or app store listings
No published case studies or client success stories (3 exist internally — must publish)
No mobile app in public app stores (Flutter developer being hired)
MCA e-filing inactive — URGENT compliance risk
655 LinkedIn followers only — very low for B2B SaaS
No public pricing — makes discovery hard for inbound leads
No press coverage or media mentions
Market awareness significantly lags product capability
